recent_projects.name: bybit-bulk-downloader
recent_projects.summary: Python library to efficiently and concurrently download historical data files from Bybit. Supports all asset types (spot, USDT-M, COIN-M, options) and all data frequencies.
recent_projects.author: aoki-h-jp

recent_projects.summary: CI/CD toolkit for flashing and testing embedded devices

recent_projects.summary: MCP server for helping user to resolve Robot Framework code issues detected by Robocop.

recent_projects.name: pygeodata
recent_projects.summary: Lightweight framework for geospatial data access and processing
